title: User Registration Flow
interaction_flow: User → RegisterSrv: GET/POST /RegisterSrv (username, mobile, email, address, pincode, password, confirmPassword)
alt [passwords do not match] → RegisterSrv → User: forward register.jsp?message=Password not matching!
RegisterSrv → UserBean: new UserBean(userName, mobileNo, emailId, address, pinCode, password)
UserServiceImpl → DBUtil: provideConnection(): Connection  [for isRegistered check]
UserServiceImpl → Database: SELECT * FROM user WHERE email=?
alt [email already registered] → UserServiceImpl → RegisterSrv: return 'Email Id Already Registered!'
UserServiceImpl → Database: INSERT INTO user VALUES(email, name, mobile, address, pincode, password)
MailMessage: build HTML welcome email with promo code ELLISON500
JavaMailUtil → JavaMailUtil: prepareMessage(session, senderEmail, recipient, subject, htmlTextMessage): MimeMessage
UserServiceImpl → DBUtil: closeConnection(ps)  [x2 — note: duplicate call, minor bug]
UserServiceImpl → RegisterSrv: return status String ('User Registered Successfully!' or error)

RegisterSrv: doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse): void — reads params, validates passwords, delegates to UserServiceImpl, forwards to JSP
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse): void — delegates to doGet
UserServiceImpl: registerUser(UserBean user): String — checks duplicate email, inserts to DB, triggers welcome email
registerUser(String userName, Long mobileNo, String emailId, String address, int pinCode, String password): String — overload, wraps UserBean creation then delegates
isRegistered(String emailId): boolean — SELECT query to check email existence
MailMessage: registrationSuccess(String emailId, String name): void — builds HTML welcome email, calls JavaMailUtil.sendMail
JavaMailUtil: sendMail(String recipient, String subject, String htmlTextMessage): void — configures SMTP session, calls prepareMessage, calls Transport.send
prepareMessage(Session, String senderEmail, String recipientEmail, String subject, String htmlTextMessage): Message — builds MimeMessage with HTML content
DBUtil: provideConnection(): Connection — singleton, reads config from ResourceBundle 'application'

key_relationships: RegisterSrv depends_on UserBean (creates instance from request params)
UserServiceImpl depends_on DBUtil (static calls for connection management)
UserServiceImpl depends_on MailMessage (static call after successful insert)
UserServiceImpl depends_on IUserConstants (TABLE_USER constant for SQL)
JavaMailUtil depends_on jakarta.mail (Session, Transport, MimeMessage, Authenticator)
conditional_branches: RegisterSrv: if password != confirmPassword → skip DB, return 'Password not matching!'
UserServiceImpl.registerUser: if isRegistered(email) == true → return 'Email Id Already Registered!' early
UserServiceImpl.registerUser: if DBUtil.provideConnection() returns null → NullPointerException risk
UserServiceImpl.registerUser: if INSERT rowsAffected == 0 → return 'User Registration Failed!' (no email sent)
UserServiceImpl.registerUser: if INSERT rowsAffected > 0 → send welcome email, return 'User Registered Successfully!'

constructors: UserBean(userName, mobileNo, emailId, address, pinCode, password)

data_objects.DB_table: user (email, name, mobile, address, pincode, password)

important_notes: RegisterSrv is @WebServlet('/RegisterSrv'), extends HttpServlet; doPost delegates to doGet
Password stored in plain text — no hashing
UserServiceImpl instantiated directly in RegisterSrv (no DI / no interface used at call site)
DBUtil uses a static singleton Connection — not thread-safe
DBUtil.closeConnection(Connection) is commented out — connections never actually closed
JavaMailUtil.sendMail loads SMTP credentials from ResourceBundle 'application' (application.properties)
Welcome email subject is 'Registration Successfull' (typo in source), includes promo code ELLISON500 (10% OFF up to 500 Rs)
firstName extracted via user.getName().split(' ')[0] before passing to MailMessage
